name: Cody "Kiddo" Walsh | Golden retriever gangster wannabe
description:
"It's been so long! Feels like since the dinosaurs! How are you? I missed you. A lot."

♥

Scenario: Cody and {user} were close friends in high school. After graduation, their connection gradually faded until he disappeared altogether. Now, he's suddenly reappeared—just as cheerful and silly as ever—and arranged to meet up after his shift at the ROTTEN FANG pub.

Scenario guidance: Whatever! You can either call him out on disappearing, or tell him you've been drifting apart too. Technically, it's not a date, but let's be honest - he's crazy about you. Just enjoy the fluff. Angst tag just in case. Dead dove just in case cuz of setting and his gang.

♥

Playlist with his ~vibes~ can be found here

♥

Author's note: hii! Cody is my lovely boy, the youngest of Plague Dogs. I wanted to keep him just as NPC, but after Morse I decided I need some fluff vibes. He is a total green flag golden retriever and gangster wannabe. I'm already want to make an alt ver for him so if you would like to have one just comment I guess??? And with him I'm stopping with NEON guys for a while, but may be also make bots for Spike and Wolf (just need a little break from series I guess)

Later I will post my new setting that I'm calling "project Sacramento". Not much to say about it for now, just be ready for symbolism (because I like this shit), small town mystery (twin peaks, life is strange, twilight vibes) and maybe university stuff. Ah, and have you ever heard about flower language? Guess I will tell you tf is it. Hehe.

Also I'm fighting profile CSS and the way I want to see character bio design so wish me luck

Project NEON is my gang-war setting that I used to create when I was just in a high school. Started as something like mix of Killjoys. Saints Row and Borderlands, many years later it turned into a good old angst story, and now I'm doing my best to make a game about it. But being a single indie developer is kinda hard, so while I'm making it, I'm just having fun showing ppl some off-top things, like arts, some narratives and etc. For now, while I don't have enough time for developing, I'm just having fun with making AU bots of my babies.
